summary: P0 Live Data Refresh bug fix verification - All 3 new admin endpoints tested and working correctly. 11/11 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Circuit breaker implementation uses progressive backoff: base cooldown * 2^(failures-1), capped at 1 hour - GOOD
Circuit breaker auto-resets on successful API call - GOOD
All 3 endpoints properly protected with require_permission('admin.matches.manage') - GOOD
Response fields match requirements: live-status returns sync_enabled, circuit_breaker, last_refresh, matches_in_queue, latest_updated_match
refresh-live returns last_status and circuit_breaker_open as required
reset-circuit-breaker returns was_open and previous_failures as required
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live refresh admin endpoints fully tested. No live matches in preview DB so refresh returns 'ok_no_matches' status. Circuit breaker was not open during testing.
